'''Bulgan''' was an [[Ansionian]], an [[Alwari]] tribal outcast of the [[Tasbir]] clan, who had a hunched back and was missing an eye due to a [[suubatar]] accident he suffered as a child. His brain was also damaged during the accident—that is, until the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] healer [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] fixed it.<ref name="The Approaching Storm" />

His disabilities were the cause of him being cast out from his clan as a child to live in the cities. He became an enforcer for [[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin|Soergg]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], who implanted a detonator chip in his neck to ensure loyalty.<ref name="The Approaching Storm" />

Bulgan was bald, had pale skin, but was, despite his hunched back, stronger than other Ansonians of average height and build. He and fellow outcast [[Kyakhta]] were tasked by [[Bossban]] Soergg to capture one of the Jedi [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] recently arrived from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to help settle a border dispute; the outcasts' mission, however, was foiled by Jedi Offee, who cured them of their mental afflictions. Their loyalties then switched to the Jedi, whom they accompanied on their [[Border dispute on Ansion/Legends|mission]] across the planet.<ref name="The Approaching Storm" />
